items.title: The fine art of creating blood donors at home; and resources for those in Chennai seeking to donate blood
items.summary: A leitmotif among blood donation organisations is the increasing difficulty in finding people with “generous veins”; and the solution could strangely be found in the living rooms of households, as illustrated by these two accounts from Chennai of parents inspiring their children to join the cause

items.title: Key link road behind DMS Metro in Teynampet leading to Gopalapuram hit by ‘blocks’
items.summary: Located behind DMS Metro and near Stella Maris college and a number of offices and commercial establishments on Dr. Radhakrishnan Salai, Muthiah Road in Vellala Teynampet funnels a considerable number of commuters from the station to various destinations in the area. Muthiah Road’s job is made harder by ‘blocks’

items.title: Children from Narikurava community in Pallavaram as ‘commentators’ in a puppetry production on environmental degradation
items.summary: A year-long puppetry production titled “Enge Engal Nadhigal” by Agai — Theatre of Voices has children from a Narikurava community in Pallavaram taking centre stage as storytellers. As part of this initiative, the children were taken on a tour of the industrial north Chennai on July 18 to understand the negative impact development can have on people’s everyday lives and bring that insight into their stories

items.title: A marathon free lunch programme in Teynampet set to cross a milestone
items.summary: On July 22, the charity run by Teynampet resident D.M. Prakash with the support of his brother based in the United States will complete 750 days on the trot. Thousand Lights MLA J.C.D. Prabhakar will be chief guest at the event commemorating the sustained effort

items.title: Quicksand in Chennai’s Pallikaranai marshland
items.summary: The first expansion of the city of Chennai in modern times happened along its southern stretch. As the government in its wisdom decided to locate the IT corridor in south Chennai, breathless development happened over a couple of decades, right around a rich natural reserve, the Pallikaranai marshland. Today, two decades later, there’s a conflict that pits development against preservation. This report attempts to pull together the several threads that have brought this particular tapestry to the fore today
